output:
Here's a budget-friendly and simple 7-day meal plan tailored to your requirements and preferences:

Day 1:
Breakfast: Scrambled eggs with spinach and tomatoes
Lunch: Turkey and avocado wrap in a gluten-free tortilla
Dinner: Baked chicken with roasted sweet potatoes and green beans

Day 2:
Breakfast: Greek yogurt with mixed berries and gluten-free granola
Lunch: Quinoa salad with grilled chicken, cucumber, and bell peppers
Dinner: Beef stir-fry with mixed vegetables and rice (no onion)

Day 3:
Breakfast: Omelette with mushrooms and spinach
Lunch: Black bean and corn salad with grilled chicken
Dinner: Baked salmon with quinoa and steamed broccoli

Day 4:
Breakfast: Smoothie with lactose-free yogurt, banana, and spinach
Lunch: Taco salad with ground beef, lettuce, tomatoes, and avocado
Dinner: Thai red curry with chicken and vegetables served with rice (no onion)

Day 5:
Breakfast: Chia seed pudding with almond milk and mixed berries
Lunch: Turkey and lettuce wraps with hummus
Dinner: Indian butter chicken with cauliflower rice

Day 6:
Breakfast: Gluten-free toast with mashed avocado and sliced tomato
Lunch: Lentil soup with gluten-free crackers
Dinner: Beef and vegetable stir-fry with rice noodles (no onion)

Day 7:
Breakfast: Lactose-free yogurt with sliced peaches and gluten-free granola
Lunch: Turkey and cranberry sandwich on gluten-free bread
Dinner: Baked chicken with sweet potato fries and steamed green beans

Remember to adjust portion sizes according to your caloric needs and consult with a healthcare professional or nutritionist if you have any specific dietary requirements or restrictions. Enjoy your meals!
